abilities.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an artifact card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

effect.description: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an artifact card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
effect.name: DigUntil

abilities.description: Target opponent loses life equal to the number of artifacts you control.
Gain control of all artifacts and creatures target opponent controls.
